title: As a Weakened Putin Follows Trump to Beijing, Iran War Offers an Opening
summary_full: With the upheaval in the Persian Gulf disrupting oil and gas supplies, Russia is looking to deepen its energy ties to China.
summary_public: With the upheaval in the Persian Gulf disrupting oil and gas supplies, Russia is looking to deepen its energy ties to China.
